issue.message: Field requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.provider.Settings#ACTION_APP_NOTIFICATION_SETTINGS`
Field requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.provider.Settings#EXTRA_APP_PACKAGE`
Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 31)
Attribute `maxResizeWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
Attribute `maxResizeHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
Attribute `previewLayout` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
Attribute `widgetFeatures` is only used in API level 28 and higher (current min is 24)
Attribute `clipToOutline` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration

Modifier parameter should be named modifier
issue.errorLine1: dragModifier: Modifier = Modifier, // 🆕 v1.8.0: IMPL_023 - Drag modifier for handle

issue.message: Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter

"notifications_enabled_subtitle" is not translated in "uk" (Ukrainian) or "tr" (Turkish)

issue.message: "notifications_permission_settings_title" is not translated in "uk" (Ukrainian) or "tr" (Turkish)
"notifications_permission_settings_message" is not translated in "uk" (Ukrainian) or "tr" (Turkish)

Formatting %d followed by words ("selected"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("done"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("deleted"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("notes"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("notes"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("requires"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("invalid"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("new"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("new"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("imported"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("hours"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("hours"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="notification_sync_warning_detail">The WebDAV server has been unreachable for %d hours. Please check your network connection or server settings.</string>

issue.message: Using `getString` to get device identifiers is not recommended
The Network Security Configuration allows the use of user certificates in the release version of your app
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
Reading a value annotated with @FrequentlyChangingValue inside composition
Reading a value annotated with @FrequentlyChangingValue inside composition
Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableLongStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Nested weights are bad for performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?attr/colorSurface` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.SimpleNotes`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?attr/colorSurface` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme_SimpleNotes`)

issue.errorLine1:
<string name="sync_auto_sync_info">🔄 Auto-Sync:
• Checks every 30 min if server is reachable
• Works on any WiFi connection
• Runs in background
• Minimal battery usage (~0.4%/day)</string>

Custom view ``ImageView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
Hardcoded string "Diese Entscheidung merken", should use `@string` resource
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
